==Hillbilly Attack==
===2.Bc4?!===
Black will almost certainly play [[/2...d5/]]. Since Black's d5 pawn is defended by both the c-pawn and the queen, White's bishop will be forced to move away, either on the following turn or after 3. exd5 cxd5.
